algorithm_contract.description: The update must describe width-based novelty checking before expansion.

modality_boundary_note: Only model_facing is intended for model prompts; gold_scoring_metadata is evaluator-only.

model_facing.algorithm_definition: Iterated Width: maintain a novelty table. For width k, expand a state only if it introduces a new k-atom conjunction not seen before; increase k when needed.

output_format.internal_state_update: one-step planner-state update for the requested algorithm

model_facing.system: You are executing iterated_width on one Blocksworld task.
model_facing.task_instruction: Execute the next step of iterated_width and respond only with JSON.

visual_input.text: Use only the visual observation supplied by the evaluator.
